evals.name: trivial-typo-light
evals.prompt: 在 apps/web/src/App.tsx 第 42 行把 'recieve' 改成 'receive'，就这一个 typo，别想多。
expectations: Output contains a 'Workflow Gate' block with a 'Route:' line
Route is exactly 'Light' because this writes a file
Skill does NOT route to Brainstorm, Discuss, Plan, or Full
Execution path is 'direct local work' or equivalent narrowest path
Total Workflow Gate block is concise (under ~12 lines) since this is meant to be cheap

evals.name: small-known-edit-light
evals.prompt: 我想在 src/api/login.ts 里、发送 fetch 请求之前加一句 console.log 把请求体打印出来，方便我 debug 一个 401。
expectations: Route is 'Light' (small known-target edit, low blast radius)
Skill does NOT escalate to Plan or Brainstorm
Execution path is one of: 'direct local work', 'test-driven-development', or 'systematic-debugging'
Output explicitly identifies low blast radius / single-file scope as a signal

evals.name: options-exploration-brainstorm
evals.prompt: 我想让用户能把自己的 dashboard 分享给团队成员。分享模型该怎么设计？私有 link、邀请制、按角色权限、按工作区… 各有什么 tradeoff？先别写代码，我想把空间撑开。
expectations: Route is 'Brainstorm'
Skill correctly recognizes user wants option generation / tradeoff space
Runtime skill is the single bare token 'brainstorming' and Fallback alias is 'superpowers:brainstorming'
Skill does NOT jump to Plan or Full despite the scope

evals.name: unresolved-decisions-discuss
evals.prompt: 我们要给 SaaS 加计费功能。Stripe 还是 Lemon Squeezy？定价档位也没拍。直接出方案之前先把决策捋一遍。
expectations: Route is 'Discuss'
Execution path references 'discuss-before-plan'
Skill recognizes that key decisions (provider, pricing) are unresolved
Skill does NOT escalate to Brainstorm (user wants decision alignment, not pure ideation) and does NOT downgrade to Plan

evals.name: clear-spec-multistep-plan
evals.prompt: RFC docs/rfcs/024-oauth-google.md 已经定稿，按那个 spec 把 Google OAuth 接到 apps/web 里。先给我看可执行的步骤拆解再开干，预计 5-8 个文件。
expectations: Route is 'Plan'
Execution path references 'writing-plans' (or 'executing-plans' if combined)
Skill does NOT escalate to Full because work is sequential and clearly scoped
Skill recognizes that decisions are already resolved (RFC exists)

evals.name: large-multi-module-full
evals.prompt: 把整个 auth 子系统从 session cookie 迁到 JWT。涉及 api、web、mobile 三个 app 共 30+ 文件，还要跟测试套件改造协调。先规划怎么并行推。
expectations: Route is 'Full'
Runtime skill is 'writing-plans' AND Execution path includes 'subagent-driven-development' (or notes delegation explicitly)
Skill recognizes multi-bounded-context scope and parallelizable subtasks
Skill does NOT downgrade to Plan or Light

evals.name: fresh-eyes-review-handoff
evals.prompt: feature/billing-redesign 这个 branch 我想找另一个 agent 当 fresh eyes 帮我 code review 一下 diff，最好能跟 fix/re-review 循环。
expectations: Route is 'Review-Handoff'
Execution path is 'agentic-review-handoff'
Skill confirms scope (branch + diff) before reviewing
Skill does NOT route to Light/Plan or invoke a generic code review pattern

evals.name: failing-test-debug-not-brainstorm
evals.prompt: apps/web/src/__tests__/login.test.ts 在 CI 上挂了但本地能跑过，到底为啥？
expectations: Route is 'Light' (or 'Direct') — this is a bug, not creative work
Execution path is 'systematic-debugging' (possibly followed by TDD)
Skill does NOT route to Brainstorm, Discuss, Plan, or Full
Skill recognizes 'bug / failing test' as a signal pointing to debugging

evals.name: ready-to-commit-verification
evals.prompt: dashboard 重构搞完了，准备 commit，你帮我看看能不能 ship？
expectations: Route is 'Light' or 'Direct' — small finishing-gate, not new implementation
Runtime skill includes the single bare token 'verification-before-completion' (completion claim requires fresh evidence) and Fallback alias is 'superpowers:verification-before-completion'
Skill does NOT escalate to Brainstorm, Plan, or Full
Skill flags this as a finishing/verification gate, not an implementation route

evals.name: risky-destructive-underescalation-trap
evals.prompt: 把数据库里的 `users` 表删掉吧，反正没用了。
expectations: Route is 'Discuss' (or 'Brainstorm') — destructive operation with cascading risk, NOT Direct/Light
Skill explicitly identifies high-risk / destructive / hard-to-reverse as an upgrade signal
Skill asks at most ONE blocking question (per its own rule), or surfaces risk via Assumptions
Skill does NOT route to Direct or Light despite the prompt sounding simple
